subject: Farfetch'd (Kanto regional form), a brown duck-like bird standing in a grassy rural landscape, holding a green leek stalk
description: Farfetch'd stands in an open grassy field rendered in a warm impressionistic painterly style. The creature is a brown duck-type bird with a cream-colored belly and facial markings, holding a long green leek stalk in its wings. The background shows rolling green hills, a warm golden sky, and loose brushstroke-style vegetation suggesting a pastoral rural countryside. The art has a notably painterly quality compared to the more typical digital anime style, giving it a rustic and grounded character. This is the standard Kanto Farfetch'd form, distinguishable from the Galarian form by the brown (not gray) coloration and non-leek-sword posture.
foreground: Farfetch'd standing, holding leek stalk in wings, brown and cream plumage
background: Impressionistic pastoral landscape, rolling green hills, warm golden sky
